chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D – 5555 of 2019 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) D/o Matter For orders on CMA No.9663/2025 17.03.2026 Mr. Bhajandas Tejwani, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Hakim Ali Shaikh, Addl. A.G. Sindh. ------------------------------------ Through this application, the petitioner has prayed for recalling of order dated 02.05.2025, whereby the instant petition was dismissed for non- prosecution. Along with the application, he has filed an affidavit stating that, due to the discontinuation of the distribution of the cause list among members of the Bar and the failure to send an intimation notice regarding the fixation of the case to his counsel, he was unable to appear before the Court on 02.05.2025. Learned AAG has no objection to the grant of this application. Accordingly, the listed application bearing CMA No.9663/2025 is granted, the order dated 02.05.2025 is hereby recalled and the matter stands restored to its original position as it was on 02.05.2025. Let fresh notice be issued to all concerned for 30.04.2026. JUDGE HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Azeem
